interface.longDescription:
Customers can now shop for groceries directly in ChatGPT for seamless checkout on DoorDash, turning recipe inspiration, meal planning, and weekly staples into an actionable shopping cart while skipping the effort of going to the store.

Customers can now benefit from an easier-than-ever, faster, and more convenient experience without compromising on delivery quality or speed. In addition to national favorites - like Kroger, Safeway, and Sprouts - DoorDash customers can also shop local gems like Bi-Rite, Gristedes, and Happier Grocery.
defaultPrompt: Get me ingredients for apple pie
